name: Terry Shand
description: American pianist, vocalist, bandleader and songwriter
abstract: Terence Alister Shand (October 1, 1904 – November 11, 1977) was an American pianist, vocalist, bandleader and songwriter.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Teagarden
about_quotes.evidence: So in 1920, I went to San Antonio. And I worked in a place called Horn Palace with Terry Shan on piano and myself and banjo and drums.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Teagarden
about_quotes.evidence: Terry Shand and I, we came and joined another band there, and it was called Youngberg Marin.

about_quotes.speaker: Don Albert
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah, right. Herman Wallman, Terry Shand, and you had some other bands, I can't call their names right now.
